company.name_jp: 株式会社エルテックス

research_notes: Website is SPA (JavaScript-rendered) - content not extractable via web_fetch tool. Main page and /company/ page both show only 'Loading...' or minimal static content. Cannot access executive/officer information due to technical limitation of web_fetch with SPA sites. No data to add without browser-based scraping. Social profiles not available without web search API.
